snippets.title: Swyx on Codex and agentic spreadsheets
snippets.takeaway: Swyx called Codex almost unrecognizable from three months earlier and framed the new demo as agentic Excel on Mac.
snippets.summary: Swyx highlighted how quickly Codex appears to be evolving, pointing to a demo from Gabriel Chua as evidence that the product is moving toward more agentic, spreadsheet-like work on Mac. The interesting signal is not just one feature, but the pace of product iteration around practical AI work surfaces.

snippets.title: Swyx on national AI agent infrastructure
snippets.takeaway: A Singapore AI GovTech estimate points to 1.3 billion agents in the country within two years, with a national MCP gateway under construction.
snippets.summary: The post is a useful signal for anyone watching AI infrastructure move from individual tools to public-sector platforms. The emphasis on a national MCP gateway suggests governments may treat agent interoperability as shared infrastructure rather than scattered app-by-app integration.
